facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Rowan now has active crisis-following from Lio, Toma, Sena, and reluctant compliance from Mett; temporary cooperative alliance established with rescued survivor Jeren; Benn and Derren remain missing elsewhere below

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: The immediate mouse overrun was escaped through a hidden bypass, but the group is now stranded in older unmapped corridors with severe injuries, structural hazards, missing companions, and a deeper bell and system-like recognition signaling larger dangers and claim stakes

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: No usable lamp, minimal supplies, repeated shardmice pressure behind them, unstable old workings, multiple injured survivors including Toma and badly hurt Jeren, and an unexplained claim-recognition system event tied to survival

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Keep the group alive in the old unmapped corridor while deciding whether to push deeper toward possible survivors Benn and Derren after hearing a bell below

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Old low service corridor beyond a patched false wall near the South Third collapse, at a broken junction and partially collapsed side room with Jeren newly freed

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Unranked, unlicensed salvage runner below South Third; bruised, dust-choked, and strained after opening a hidden bypass, guiding survivors across a weak floor, rescuing Jeren, and receiving a visible blue notice naming his trait Residual Hearing (ungraded)
